comment: 33yo female, asymptomatic, no personal cancer diagnosis. Pedigree suggestive of BAP1 tumor predisposition syndrome: father diagnosed with uveal melanoma age 52 (first-degree relative); mother diagnosed with pleural mesothelioma age 60 (first-degree relative). Cluster of BAP1-spectrum tumors (uveal melanoma + mesothelioma) across two first-degree relatives. Germline BAP1 testing not yet performed in proband. Engine fires RF-BAP1-FAMILY-HISTORY-SUSPICION → routes to PreventionPlan: genetic-counseling referral + germline BAP1 testing of proband; if pathogenic-variant-carrier → cascade to anchored carrier-surveillance RFs (annual dilated ophthalmoscopy / OCT for uveal melanoma + dermatologic exam for cutaneous melanoma + abdominal MRI for ccRCC + mesothelioma symptom-awareness with low-threshold chest imaging). Validates v0.2-B hereditary pedigree-suspicion pilot. Anchored DIS-RCC + DIS-MESOTHELIOMA.
